title: Stability, inheritance and mechanisms of resistance to helicoverpa armigera (hub.) In chickpea (cicer arietinum linn.)
abstract: The present investigation "Stability, Inheritance and Mcchanisrns of resistance to Helicovcrpa armigern (Hub.) in Chickpea (Ciccr arietinum Linn.)" was taken under laboratory, glasshousc and field conditions at ICRISAT, International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, Patanchcru during 2000-2002...
